description_long: This is a spacious suburban house with a prominent dark gable roof and a large front porch supported by white columns. The front yard features a manicured lawn, shrubs, and a central walkway leading to the main entrance. The house has two visible stories, with a balcony or open terrace above the porch. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a children's playset. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, providing ample natural light. Mature trees and landscaping elements are present on both the front and back lawns, enhancing the residential appeal.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof, front porch, fenced backyard, and symmetrical windows. The property features landscaped lawns, mature trees, and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with columns, central walkway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the fenced backyard, patio area, and garage entrance with mature trees.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the backyard, patio furniture, playset, and side windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the back wall, large windows, and part of the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, white columns, steps, and decorative landscaping.
